lessons.generalized_behavior: Visual artifacts require purpose-fit visual presentation declarations, teacher-professional presentation requirements, accessibility/static checks, rendered proof tier labels, and export replay evidence.
Browser/render methods must be capability-probed in the current sandbox, ranked, and recorded with reliability evidence; known-bad methods should be skipped unless conditions change.
Robert's normal workflow should complete as much as possible inside /mnt/data and ChatGPT sandbox, with PC addenda prepared as optional stronger verification lanes.
Validators must distinguish between forbidden declarations and lists/descriptions of blocked anti-patterns, avoiding string-search false positives without structural context.
